deviations.description: The process model enforces the measurement of blood pressure and pulse as a prerequisite for determining donor eligibility, which is no longer required under Version 2. This results in unnecessary restriction of donor eligibility assessment.
process_model_reference: measure blood pressure and pulse, determine donor eligibility

deviations.description: The process model includes the activity 'measure blood pressure and pulse' before 'determine donor eligibility', which is now only permitted but not required. The process continues to enforce an outdated constraint.

The process model treats 'measure blood pressure and pulse' as a combined mandatory step, whereas Version 2 separates them and makes both optional. The process unnecessarily enforces both measurements.
